effect.focal_points: limit focal points per section; use contrast to direct attention to the single most important element

quotes: Generous white space; clean, never cluttered. **Limit focal points per section** — use contrast to direct attention to the single most important element.

effect.requirement: break up text walls with imagery and icons

quotes: "Show, don't tell": break up text walls with imagery and icons.

effect.metadata_requirement: section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence
effect.purpose: Color blocks delineate topics (My Compass webpage pattern)
effect.sequencing_rule: alternate backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge; no two identical adjacent backgrounds

quotes: Color blocks delineate topics (My Compass webpage pattern) — alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge. **[GENERAL]: section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.**
